title: hermione jonquilla
intro: Hermione jonquilla, also known as the Daffodil Narcissus, is a perennial bulbous plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, antitussive, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hermione jonquilla include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Hermione jonquilla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
